name: supplymind-skills
description: Claude Code skill pack for ML hackathon discipline: benchmark-runner, autoresearch-experiment, live-demo-orchestrator.
author: ShAuRyA-Noodle

skills.name: benchmark-runner
skills.description: TDD discipline for performance claims: RED baseline, implement, GREEN post-change, verify delta, receipt.

skills.name: autoresearch-experiment
skills.description: Karpathy-pattern autonomous ML research loop: program.md + mutable candidate + fixed-budget runner + bootstrap-CI95 accept/reject + lab notebook.

skills.name: live-demo-orchestrator
skills.description: Pre/during/post live demo discipline with offline replay fallbacks, golden response capture, and backup video protocol.

attribution: Methodology derived from Jesse Vincent's obra/superpowers (MIT).
